name: Bond
summary: See the auras of nearby Survivors.

name: Prove Thyself
summary: Improve cooperative repair efficiency when working with nearby Survivors.

name: Leader
summary: Improve certain action speeds for nearby teammates.

name: Quick & Quiet
summary: Hide the loud-noise notification caused by a rushed action.

name: Sprint Burst
summary: Gain a burst of speed when you begin running.

name: Adrenaline
summary: Recover and gain speed when the exit gates become powered.

name: Empathy
summary: See injured or dying Survivors from a distance.

name: Botany Knowledge
summary: Improve healing speed at the cost of reduced item efficiency.

name: Self-Care
summary: Heal yourself without requiring a med-kit.

name: Iron Will
summary: Reduce the volume of grunts of pain while injured.

name: Calm Spirit
summary: Reduce interactions that reveal your location through screams or disturbed wildlife.

name: Saboteur
summary: See nearby hooks and sabotage them without a toolbox.

name: Balanced Landing
summary: Reduce landing penalties and gain speed after falling.

name: Urban Evasion
summary: Move faster while crouching.

name: Streetwise
summary: Reduce item-consumption rates for yourself and nearby teammates.

name: Technician
summary: Reduce generator-repair noise and limit the consequences of failed skill checks.

name: Lithe
summary: Gain a burst of speed after performing a rushed vault.

name: Alert
summary: Reveal the Killer's aura after they perform certain destructive actions.

name: Open-Handed
summary: Increase the effective range of aura-reading abilities.

name: Up the Ante
summary: Increase the Luck of the remaining Survivors while teammates are alive.

name: Ace in the Hole
summary: Improve the add-ons found attached to items from chests.

name: Left Behind
summary: Reveal the Hatch aura when you are the final Survivor remaining.

name: Borrowed Time
summary: Extend protection effects granted to Survivors rescued from a hook.

name: Unbreakable
summary: Recover from the dying state more quickly and stand up once without help.

name: We're Gonna Live Forever
summary: Improve healing when assisting a Survivor in the dying state.

name: Dead Hard
summary: Gain a brief Endurance effect after meeting its activation condition.

name: No Mither
summary: Remain injured throughout the trial while gaining several survival benefits.

name: Sole Survivor
summary: Reduce the Killer's ability to read your aura as teammates are eliminated.

name: Object of Obsession
summary: Periodically reveal your aura and the Killer's aura under certain conditions.

name: Decisive Strike
summary: Attempt a skill check to escape the Killer after recently being unhooked.

name: Pharmacy
summary: Search chests more effectively and gain improved access to medical supplies.

name: Vigil
summary: Help yourself and nearby Survivors recover from negative status effects faster.

name: Wake Up!
summary: Reveal exit gates and improve your gate-opening speed during the endgame.

name: Tenacity
summary: Crawl more quickly while recovering from the dying state.

name: Detective's Hunch
summary: Reveal nearby objectives after a generator is completed.

name: Stake Out
summary: Earn tokens near the Killer that improve successful skill checks.

name: Dance With Me
summary: Hide your scratch marks briefly after a rushed vault or locker exit.

name: Windows of Opportunity
summary: Reveal nearby pallets, windows and breakable walls.

name: Boil Over
summary: Make it more difficult for the Killer to carry you to a hook.

name: Diversion
summary: Throw a pebble to create a misleading noise notification.

name: Deliverance
summary: Unhook yourself after safely rescuing another Survivor.

name: Autodidact
summary: Gain increasingly powerful healing skill checks as the trial progresses.

name: Breakdown
summary: Temporarily break the hook you were rescued from and reveal the Killer's aura.

name: Aftercare
summary: Create mutual aura-reading connections with Survivors you have helped.

name: Distortion
summary: Consume tokens to prevent the Killer from reading your aura.

name: Solidarity
summary: Partially heal yourself while healing another Survivor without a med-kit.

name: Poised
summary: Hide your scratch marks briefly after a generator is completed.

name: Head On
summary: Leave a locker quickly to stun the Killer when correctly positioned.

name: Flip-Flop
summary: Convert part of your recovery progress into wiggle progress when picked up.

name: Buckle Up
summary: Gain information while helping a Survivor recover from the dying state.

name: Mettle of Man
summary: Earn protection-based progress toward surviving an additional hit.

name: Better Together
summary: Reveal the generator you are repairing to nearby Survivors.

name: Fixated
summary: See your own scratch marks and walk more quickly.

name: Inner Strength
summary: Cleanse a totem and later heal yourself while hiding inside a locker.

name: Babysitter
summary: Help a rescued Survivor conceal their trail and gain information about the Killer.

name: Camaraderie
summary: Pause the struggle timer when a teammate approaches while you are hooked.

name: Second Wind
summary: Earn delayed healing after helping another Survivor and later being unhooked.

name: Lucky Break
summary: Temporarily hide blood pools and scratch marks after becoming injured.

name: Any Means Necessary
summary: Reset dropped pallets and reveal their auras.

name: Breakout
summary: Help a carried Survivor wiggle free by remaining near the Killer.

name: Off the Record
summary: Gain protection and concealment after being unhooked.

name: Red Herring
summary: Create a misleading generator noise notification after entering a locker.

name: For the People
summary: Instantly transfer a health state to another Survivor at a personal cost.

name: Soul Guard
summary: Gain brief protection after recovering from the dying state.

name: Blood Pact
summary: Create an aura and movement-speed connection with the Obsession.

name: Repressed Alliance
summary: Block a generator temporarily after repairing for enough time.

name: Visionary
summary: Reveal the auras of nearby generators while searching for your next objective.

name: Desperate Measures
summary: Perform healing and unhooking actions faster for each injured or hooked Survivor.

name: Built to Last
summary: Restore part of a depleted item's charges by spending time inside a locker.

name: Appraisal
summary: Search opened chests again to obtain additional items during the trial.

name: Deception
summary: Pretend to enter a locker while concealing your scratch marks and blood pools.

name: Power Struggle
summary: Drop a nearby pallet while being carried after gaining enough wiggle progress.

name: Fast Track
summary: Gain tokens when teammates are hooked and spend them on a successful generator skill check.

name: Smash Hit
summary: Gain a burst of speed after stunning the Killer with a pallet.

name: Self-Preservation
summary: Temporarily conceal your scratch marks, blood pools and pain sounds when a nearby teammate is hit.

name: Counterforce
summary: Cleanse Totems faster and reveal the location of another distant Totem.

name: Resurgence
summary: Immediately gain healing progress after being rescued from a hook.

name: Blast Mine
summary: Install a trap on a generator that blinds and stuns the Killer when they damage it.

name: Bite the Bullet
summary: Suppress healing noises and reduce the penalty caused by failed healing skill checks.

name: Flashbang
summary: Create a Flash Grenade inside a locker after completing enough generator repairs.

name: Rookie Spirit
summary: Reveal generators that are currently losing repair progress.

name: Clairvoyance
summary: After cleansing a Totem, reveal important nearby objects while empty-handed.

name: Boon: Circle of Healing
summary: Bless a Totem to create an area that improves healing support for Survivors.

name: Boon: Shadow Step
summary: Bless a Totem to conceal nearby Survivors' scratch marks and protect their auras.

name: Overcome
summary: Extend your movement-speed boost after becoming injured.

name: Corrective Action
summary: Use earned tokens to reduce the effects of nearby teammates' failed skill checks.

name: Boon: Exponential
summary: Bless a Totem to improve recovery and allow Survivors to recover from the dying state.

name: Parental Guidance
summary: Conceal your scratch marks, blood pools and pain sounds after stunning the Killer.

name: Empathic Connection
summary: Allow injured teammates to see your aura and improve your healing speed.

name: Boon: Dark Theory
summary: Bless a Totem to slightly increase the movement speed of nearby Survivors.

name: Inner Focus
summary: Track nearby scratch marks and reveal the Killer after a nearby teammate loses health.

name: Residual Manifest
summary: Apply a temporary aura-reading penalty after successfully blinding the Killer.

name: Overzealous
summary: Gain improved generator-repair speed after cleansing or blessing a Totem.

name: Wiretap
summary: Install a device on a generator that reveals the Killer while they remain nearby.

name: Reactive Healing
summary: Gain healing progress when another nearby Survivor loses a health state.

name: Low Profile
summary: Conceal your tracks when you become the only active Survivor.

name: Better Than New
summary: Grant a temporary action-speed benefit to Survivors after healing them.

name: Reassurance
summary: Temporarily pause a nearby hooked Survivor's sacrifice progress.

name: Hyperfocus
summary: Chain successful great skill checks to increase their frequency and rewards.

name: Potential Energy
summary: Store repair progress as tokens and transfer it to another generator.

name: Fogwise
summary: Reveal the Killer's aura after completing a great generator skill check.

name: Quick Gambit
summary: Improve teammates' generator repair speed while you are being chased nearby.

name: Friendly Competition
summary: Gain a temporary repair-speed benefit after completing a generator cooperatively.

name: Teamwork: Power of Two
summary: Gain a movement-speed benefit after healing another Survivor while remaining close together.

name: Cut Loose
summary: Suppress the sound and noise notification of rushed vaults after performing one during a chase.

name: Blood Rush
summary: Temporarily recover from Exhaustion by sacrificing a health state under specific conditions.

name: Teamwork: Collective Stealth
summary: Suppress scratch marks after another Survivor finishes healing you while you remain close together.

name: Background Player
summary: Gain a burst of movement speed when the Killer picks up another Survivor.

name: Troubleshooter
summary: Reveal useful generator and Killer information after being chased near a completed objective.

name: Made for This
summary: Gain situational movement and protection benefits while injured.

name: Scavenger
summary: Earn progress from successful skill checks toward restoring a depleted toolbox.

name: Dramaturgy
summary: Perform a dramatic sprint that produces one of several unpredictable effects.

name: Scene Partner
summary: Scream while looking toward the Killer to reveal their aura, with a chance of an additional scream.

name: Plot Twist
summary: Enter the dying state voluntarily and recover privately to return fully healed.

name: Lucky Star
summary: Suppress pain sounds and reveal useful teammate and generator information after leaving a locker.

name: Chemical Trap
summary: Install a trap on a dropped pallet that slows the Killer after they destroy it.

name: Light-Footed
summary: Suppress the sound of your running footsteps while healthy.

name: Champion of Light
summary: Move faster while using a flashlight and hinder the Killer after successfully blinding them.

name: Boon: Illumination
summary: Bless a Totem to reveal nearby generators and chests to Survivors inside its range.

name: Deadline
summary: Increase skill-check frequency while injured, with checks appearing in less predictable positions.

name: Invocation: Weaving Spiders
summary: Complete a lengthy basement ritual to permanently reduce the remaining repair requirement of generators.

name: Strength in Shadows
summary: Heal yourself in the basement and briefly reveal the Killer after completing the heal.

name: Wicked
summary: Escape from a basement hook and reveal the Killer after being unhooked.

name: Bardic Inspiration
summary: Perform music and roll a die to grant nearby Survivors a temporary skill-check benefit.

name: Mirrored Illusion
summary: Create an illusion of yourself beside a completed objective to mislead the Killer.

name: Still Sight
summary: Stand still briefly to reveal important nearby objects and the Killer.

name: Finesse
summary: Vault more quickly while healthy when the perk is available.

name: Hardened
summary: After completing certain interactions, suppress a scream and reveal the Killer instead.

name: Specialist
summary: Earn tokens from chests and skill checks to reduce a generator's remaining repair requirement.

name: Eyes of Belmont
summary: Reveal the Killer after a generator is completed and extend other Killer aura-reading effects.

name: Exultation
summary: Upgrade and recharge your held item after stunning the Killer with a pallet.

name: Moment of Glory
summary: After opening or rummaging through enough chests, automatically heal after surviving while injured.

name: Invocation: Treacherous Crows
summary: Complete a basement ritual that causes the Killer's aura to be revealed after disturbing crows.

name: Clean Break
summary: Become Broken after being healed by a teammate, then automatically recover a health state later.

name: Shoulder the Burden
summary: Transfer one hook state from a rescued Survivor to yourself at significant personal risk.

name: Do No Harm
summary: Heal teammates faster based on how many hook stages they have accumulated.

name: Duty of Care
summary: Taking a protection hit while healthy grants nearby teammates a temporary movement-speed boost.

name: Rapid Response
summary: Reveal the Killer briefly whenever you become Exhausted and allow a rushed locker exit to trigger Exhaustion.

name: Apocalyptic Ingenuity
summary: Rummage through chests to gain the ability to replace a broken pallet with a fragile pallet.

name: Come and Get Me!
summary: After an unhook, draw attention to yourself while concealing nearby injured teammates.

name: Teamwork: Toughen Up
summary: After a nearby teammate stuns or blinds the Killer, conceal your pain sounds and tracks while injured.

name: Conviction
summary: Earn the ability to recover immediately from the dying state for a limited time after healing teammates.

name: Last Stand
summary: After spending time near the Killer outside a chase, perform a nearby fast vault to stun them.

name: Teamwork: Throw Down
summary: Stunning the Killer grants nearby injured teammates protection and reveals the Killer to them.
